title: [codereview] pinctrl uart1 pin choice for Heltec V3 spare console
description: After adding uart1_default on GPIO6(TX)/GPIO7(RX) in heltec_wifi_lora32_v3-pinctrl.dtsi:9ia2, verify pin safety: are GPIO6/7 exposed on standard headers? Any boot strapping (e.g. GPIO0, GPIO45, etc.)? Does it conflict with SX1262 or OLED? Test build with overlay and physical pinout. Alternative: use GPIO4/GPIO5 or GPIO19/GPIO20. Discovered during lora_ipv6_mesh-9ia2 fix. Must fix before closing main issue.
